info.line: Installs a custom modpack based on GAMMA EXP Edition
GAMMA EXP Edition is a merge of GAMMA and Expedition 2.3
This profile extends GAMMA EXP Edition using a selection of mods created by the GAMMA discord community found in #mod-posting and in ModDB
Amongst the extra mods included there is gameplay enhancements and additional weapons from BaS22 update, Athi weapon mods and more, all with 3DSS integration
Where needed, patches for mods to synergize with GAMMA have been created by me and are included in this profile
This profile requires the base profile ``GAMMA EXP Edition`` which needs to be added to EXT not necessarily installed

installCompletionMessage.line: 1. MEET THE REQUIREMENTS
This profile is enhanced for DX 11
It's recommended to play at 2K resolution and if can, use DSR. This will greatly increase image quality with these shaders
This EXT profile has installed in Mod Organizer 2 profiles that can be selected to play ``GAMMA EXP Edition`` Redux in a certain way
2. LAUNCHING THE GAME FOR THE FIRST TIME
FOLLOW these steps when running any of these profile for the first time after install
1. When you select any profile, run Apply Settings desktop shortcut to install in Anomaly the Reshade for that profile
2. Launch the game with Anomaly (DX11 or DX11 AVX) executables in MO and change your preferences in game settings menu
3. After whem you exit the game run Save Settings desktop shortcut to keep the settings at step 2
4. Whenever you come back to play this profile, run again Apply Settings to reapply in Anomaly the Reshade and all settings saved at step 3
3. RESHADE AND GAME SETTINGS
This profile comes with its own reshade
5. PROFILE KITS
This EXT profile has installed in Mod Organizer the base profile called `GAMMA EXP Edition Redux` plus 2 more kits
The `GAMMA EXP Edition Redux` includes all the gameplay enhancements and additional weapons from BaS22 update, Athi weapon mods and more, all with 3DSS integration
A kit is a prefab variation of the base profile modlist for easy swap between different configuration of optional mods as explained in PROFILE CUSTOMIZATION
All kits use the their own settings, use Apply Settings whenever you switch to them and Save Settings if you change your preferences in the game settings menu
- `GAMMA EXP Edition Redux`                      This is the default profile with the Expedition graphics overhaul (Shaders, VFX and weather)
- `GAMMA EXP Edition Redux [ Custom ]`           A variant of the default profile with instead Anomaly Custom graphics (Shaders, VFX and weather)
- `GAMMA EXP Edition Redux [ Atmospherics ]`     A variant of the default profile with instead  GAMMA graphics (Atmospherics weather) untouched
4. PROFILE CUSTOMIZATION
each profile can be customized further by enabling or disabling mods in the modlist and as well reinstalling some
- Change UI
you can disable GAMMA Enhanced GUI mods and enable ``GAMMA EXP Edition Redux - Aydin's HUD & UI - Textured``
- Add new weathers
you can enable ``A.b.n.o.r.m.a.L._W.e.a.T.h.e.R`` to add extra weathers to what the profile comes with
- Change the HUD
Right click and reinstall `GAMMA EXP Edition Redux - Dynahud Hud Manager [ Reinstall to configure ]` and select a new HUD option in the installer. Make sure you use the correct BHS patch
- Change the Minimap
Right click and reinstall `GAMMA EXP Edition Redux - Dynahud Hud Manager [ Reinstall to configure ]` and select change minimap in the installer.
- Enable BHSRO
Enable the main BHSRO mod and all the patches. Filter the modlist using BHSRO as string to find these mods
- Enable BHS Reworked
Enable the main BHS Reworked mod and all the patches. Filter the modlist using `BHS Reworked` as string to find these mods
check the EXT profile modpage for configuration and details https://discord.com/channels/912320241713958912/1080180246038446080/1080180246038446080
5. CREDITS
Check the Expedition ModDb page's Credits section for details about all thirty party mods included
https://www.moddb.com/mods/stalker-anomaly/addons/expedition-graphical-overhaul-addon-for-anomaly-151
All additional mods are credited in this profile modpage
